---
title: "Mary Hicks"
---

## Mary Hicks

**Dates:** (b. Hursley 1845/6)

### Description

nurserymaid, daughter of Edmund Hicks

### Biography

Daughter of Edmund and Mary Hicks of Otterbourne, she is recorded as nurserymaid to the four small children of the Rev. George Merriman, headmaster of the Royal Grammar School Guildford in the census of 7 April 1861, but was sent home for idleness by 28 May 1862.

### Letters

- Letter from May 7th 1862[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from May 28th 1861
- Letter from May 21st 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
